title: QR Code Review Collection: The Complete Setup Guide for Any Business
titleZh: QR Code 評論收集：任何商家的完整設定指南

metaDescription: Learn how to set up a QR code for Google reviews. This guide covers getting your review link, creating codes, placement strategies, and measuring results to boost your local reputation.
